task: place the burger meat in the sink
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A burger patty is on the wooden table. A blue plastic sink is on the right. The patty is a solid object with a flat surface; the sink has an open basin. STRATEGY - First, reach for the burger patty to grasp it. Then, transport it to the sink. Finally, place it inside the sink basin. Failure modes include dropping the patty during transport or misplacing it outside the sink. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the patty at its body for a stable grasp. Step 2 grasp the patty's body for secure hold. Step 3 transport the patty to the sink's basin. Step 4 place the patty inside the sink's basin.
Goal: inside(burger_patty, sink)
Scene: burger_patty, sink, table
Step 1: reach(burger_patty)
  affordance_region: the body of the burger patty
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, burger_patty, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, burger_patty) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(burger_patty)
  affordance_region: the body of the burger patty
  contact: holding(burger_patty) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(burger_patty)
Step 3: transport(burger_patty -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink basin
  spatial: above(burger_patty, sink, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(burger_patty)
  done_when: above(burger_patty, sink, 0.05)
Step 4: place(burger_patty -> sink)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the sink basin
  contact: surface_contact(burger_patty, sink) [completion]; released(burger_patty) [completion]
  pose: inside(burger_patty, sink) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(burger_patty, sink) AND released(burger_patty)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the burger patty
the body of the burger patty
an empty area inside the sink basin
an empty area inside the sink basin
